name: Jujutsu Kaisen RPG
description:
JJK RPG

In this rp you’ll just get to do what you want… I try to get as many characters in here as I can.. but the main cast Gojo, Yuji, Nobara, and megumi is here of course..

June 23- i just updated character sheets, add multiple scenarios, and changed the initial message to make an rpg for you can do whatever/ be whatever.

Oct 29- just Added lorebook and edit character definition to lower tokens

April 10th, 2026- I just updated lorebook by making multiple to help separate key information and hope it fixes some issues like mixing up information.

Scenario:

1. 2006

2. Jujustu Kaisen 0

3. 2018

4. Heian era

5. you get to decide

Just be detail in the first message of which scenario you want or tell bot which scenario you want

(Im using Deepseek and Gemini for this to work properly i cant help you if you using jllm)

Use: [ooc: Do not describe the thoughts or actions of {{user}}, this is strictly forbidden. Only portray {{char}}. Do not SPEAK for {{user}}.]

TO FIND ME:

Discord ┈➤ PAPA REN

If you would like to support Checkout Kofi: KOFI

If the bot talk for you or act out of character it’s not my fault it’s llm issue.. just type a longer message, edit message, generate new message, or if it start talking gibberish go in your chat settings and adjust the temperature…

Try using this in your memory or the end of your message in the chat.

[{{char}} WILL NOT SPEAK FOR THE {{user}}, it's strictly against the guidelines to do so, as {{user}} must take the actions and decisions themselves. Only {{user}} can speak for themselves. DO NOT impersonate {{user}}, do not describe their actions or feelings. ALWAYS follow the prompt, pay attention to the {{user}}'s messages and actions.]
creator: Papa Ren
